CustomField.formula: NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( Gerencia__c ))) && NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( Area__c ))) && NOT(ISBLANK(TEXT( Tecnologia__c ))) && NOT(ISBLANK( Coste_estimado__c )) && NOT(ISBLANK( Fecha_Fin__c )) && NOT(ISBLANK( Fecha_Inicio__c )) && NOT(ISBLANK( Importe_total_2__c )) && Validacion_Crossobject_Preventa__c
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Required fields: Management, Area, Technology, Estimated Cost, End Date, Start Date, Gross Margin, Proyect Leader of Presales, Proyect Leader of Execution
CustomField.label: Validado para Entregada
